description: A plain candid outdoor photograph of a man, apparently photographed at the time of an ICE arrest. The subject is a middle-aged bald man with a slight build, frowning at the camera, wearing a black sleeveless athletic tank top with a blue-and-teal trim collar. He has small tattoos on his left upper arm/bicep. He stands on a sandy/gravel roadside; behind him are a chain-link fence, dry desert brush, scattered trees and tall cypress, a streetlight, suburban houses, and parked cars (a red sedan and a dark SUV) under a blue sky with clouds, consistent with a Phoenix/Arizona setting (per the tweet, ERO Phoenix). There is no overlaid text, headline, slogan, agency seal, or graphic design on the image; it is an unstyled operational/arrest photo. Marked is_designed=false. Intent per the accompanying tweet: to publicize the arrest of a named criminal alien and reinforce the agency's 'protecting Americans' messaging, but the image itself is a candid photo, not a designed meme.
